films.title: Night of the Living Dead
films.overview: A ragtag group barricade themselves in an old Pennsylvania farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls ravaging the Northeast.

films.title: The Dark Half
films.overview: Following the public's realization that Thad Beaumont and George Stark are one and the same, the former stages a mock funeral, only for a series of gruesome murders to begin occurring as in his books.

films.title: Dawn of the Dead
films.overview: During an ever-growing epidemic of zombies that have risen from the dead, two Philadelphia SWAT team members, a traffic reporter, and his television-executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall.

films.title: Knightriders
films.overview: A medieval reenactment troupe struggles to maintain its family-like dynamic amid pressure from local authorities, interest from talent agents, and their so-called king's delusions of grandeur.

films.title: Land of the Dead
films.overview: The living dead have taken over the world, and the remaining humans live in a walled city to protect themselves as they cope with the situation.

films.title: Day of the Dead
films.overview: As the world is overrun by zombies, scientists and military personnel in an underground Florida bunker must decide on how they should deal with the undead.

films.title: Diary of the Dead
films.overview: A group of young filmmakers encounter real zombies while filming a horror movie of their own.

films.title: Martin
films.overview: A young man, convinced he's a vampire, goes to live with his elderly and hostile cousin in a small Pennsylvanian town, where he tries to suppress his bloodlust.

films.title: Hungry Wives
films.overview: An unhappy suburban housewife gets mixed up in witchcraft with unexpected consequences.

films.title: The Crazies
films.overview: The military attempts to contain a manmade virus causing death and permanent insanity in those infected, as it overtakes a small Pennsylvania town.

films.title: Survival of the Dead
films.overview: Off the coast of North America, locals simultaneously fight a zombie epidemic while hoping for a cure to revert their undead relatives back to normal.

films.title: Two Evil Eyes
films.overview: A duo of Edgar Allan Poe adaptations about a greedy wife's attempt to embezzle her dying husband's fortune, and a sleazy reporter's adoption of a strange black cat.

films.title: Bruiser
films.overview: After years of being browbeaten and walked on, a man wakes one day wearing an expressionless mask, fitted with a personality that enables him to take revenge.

films.title: Monkey Shines
films.overview: A quadriplegic man is given a trained monkey help him with every day activities, until the little monkey begins to develop feelings, and rage, against its new master and those who get too close to him.

films.title: Creepshow
films.overview: Five grisly tales from a 1950s-style comic, including a murdered father rising from beyond, a bizarre meteor, a vengeful husband, a mysterious crate's occupant, and a plague of cockroaches.

films.title: The Amusement Park
films.overview: An elderly gentleman goes for what he assumes will be an ordinary day at the amusement park, only to find himself in the midst of a hellish nightmare.
